title: hygroryza aristata
intro: Hygroryza aristata, also known as the 'rice grass' or 'rice lemongrass', is a type of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. The plant is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hygroryza aristata include lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues, making it a sought-after natural remedy. Herbal preparations of Hygroryza aristata can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and home remedies.
